text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Oh! I'm so glad I finally found you!
There's something I reeeally want to tell
you!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Um, thank you so, SO much! I just HAD
to say that loud and clear!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
So many people came out to my concert,
and it's all thanks to you! Hehe, it's like
a dream!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I mentioned before that as an Umadol, I
want to make this birthday concert the
best present ever to all my fans who
support me...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: But it really feels like I'm the one who's receiving the greatest gift. Getting to do a show like this makes me the happiest Umadol in the world!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Can't dawdle, though. Time to return my
gratitude in full! Falco, locking iiiiin!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I'll make this the beeeest birthday
concert ever! Let me show you what the
world's future top Umadol can really do!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Make sure to keep your eyes on me from
the VIP seats! I'm planning on shining
even brighter than the stars!
